column1: # Tutorial Chapter 1, Lesson 3: labels, long-label storage,
# default apostrophe prefix, F5 GOTO, and pointer-key commit while
# Unsupported tutorial subflows intentionally not covered here:
# cursor-position editing inside F2 EDIT mode.
KEYS INCOME STATEMENT 1989: Sloane Camera and Video
ASSERT_PANEL_L1   A:A1: 'INCOME STATEMENT 1989: Sloane Camera and Video
# Moving to B1 proves the long label is stored in A1, not spread into
# the blank cells it visually spills across. The rendered B1 cell may
# still show spill text, so the control panel is the storage assertion.
# Lesson 3 uses GOTO (F5) to jump to A5 before entering "Net Sales".
ASSERT_PANEL_L3   Enter address to go to
# Quarter labels use pointer-key commit: RIGHT stores the current
# label and moves to the next cell.
